即将产生持续伤害区域，<style="emph-gn">远离队友和队友的灵魂！</style>
技能对目标产生影响，或留下存在一段时间的伤害区域，使得目标持续受到伤害（该类伤害无法触发幸运效果）

推荐职责：守护
守护队友击败全部怪物，并尽可能减少队友生命损失

技巧攻略：引导怪物将持续伤害技能释放在远离队友的位置，并远离伤害区域

推荐职责：守护
守护队友击败全部怪物，并尽可能减少队友生命损失

技巧攻略：引导怪物将持续伤害技能释放在远离队友的位置，并远离伤害区域

推荐职责：守护
守护队友击败全部怪物，并尽可能减少队友生命损失

技巧攻略：引导怪物将持续伤害技能释放在远离队友的位置，并远离伤害区域
抵抗风力，注意躲避龙卷风，并观察<style="emph-gn">伊戈雷乌斯翅膀</style>生成的伤害区域提前规避！
使用<style="emph-gn">疾跑</style>抵抗引力，逃离雷霆伤害区域！

裂地斩：随机点名一名玩家，蓄积火焰力量劈砍而下，产生扇形伤害区域。
技巧攻略：被点名的玩家远离队友，困难以上模式中，扇形火焰或残留火焰伤害区域，需要注意火焰位置远离灵魂区域。

迷失幻梦：梦魇的力量使玩家进入无法分辨危险的幻梦状态，此时地上的预警范围会和实际伤害区域相反。
技巧攻略：梦魇释放打击技能前，若自身处于幻梦状态，则应前往预警区域上躲避反转的攻击。

心魔召唤：在场地外围召唤一圈心魔幻象，部分心魔幻象会释放和梦魇相同的技能招式。并且当玩家处于幻梦状态时，心魔的施法表现也会受到反转影响。
技巧攻略：观察梦魇的伤害区域，根据是否处于幻梦状态判断会复制技能的心魔位置，寻找安全区域。

时空立场：交互时空水晶，水晶会变化为时空立场，在立场中的玩家免疫弹射，并大额减免受到的伤害。
技巧攻略：首领在释放时空闪击技能时，根据提示开启水晶并站在时空立场中。在困难难度以上，交互时空立场的玩家还会留下时空湮灭之地，在躲避完伤害之后，需要尽快把伤害区域放置在场地外侧。

烬灭轨迹：蚀花的残影点名2个玩家，蓄力后发射火焰冲击波，湮灭掉路径上所有的幻蚀残响。幻蚀残响湮灭会爆炸溢散幻蚀能量，给所有玩家施加持续掉血的负面效果，并在原地留下持续伤害区域。
技巧攻略：被点名的玩家引导火焰路径方向，尽量摧毁场景中所有幻蚀残响，治疗职业保持团队生命值健康。

大炎戒：蚀花的残影蓄积体内能量，造成环形高额伤害，随后再次蓄力，对全场造成高额火属性范围衰减伤害，并引爆场内所有的幻蚀残响。幻蚀残响爆炸会造成高额全场伤害，给所有玩家施加持续掉血的负面效果，并在原地留下持续伤害区域。
技巧攻略：尽量利用烬灭轨迹来摧毁幻蚀残响，如果被大炎戒摧毁，则需要提前开启减伤技能。

炎弧斩：蚀花的残影持剑横扫1/4场地，摧毁所有触碰到的幻蚀残响·斩，残响湮灭会爆炸并溢散能量，给所有玩家施加短时的高额持续掉血负面效果，场景中还会留下持续伤害区域。
技巧攻略：守护职业需要注意需要提前把首领朝向引导至横扫的开始位置。过程中治疗职业注意保持团队生命值健康，并开启减伤技能。噩梦模式下还会同步产生一个幻象横扫，需要团队谨慎走位。

红莲圆舞：蚀花的残影把剑插入地下，引爆岩浆冲击场景，并引爆所有幻蚀残响·斩。被摧毁的剑影会产生全场的剧烈爆炸并溢散能量，给所有玩家施加短时的高额持续掉血负面效果，场景中还会留下持续伤害区域。
技巧攻略：尽量利用炎弧斩清理幻蚀残响·斩，如果被红莲圆舞摧毁，则提前开启减伤技能。

Direkomendasikan "Intensitas Ilusi" mencapai 1000
Kekuatan misterius Lembah Hutan memberikan kemampuan tambahan untuk berbagai peran:
Pelindung: Saat skill class menghasilkan damage, menambahkan satu kali fixed damage sebesar %Defense + %HP
Pendukung: Saat melepaskan skill non-damage, menghasilkan satu kali damage area ke sekitar
Penyerang: Damage Ilusi +10%
Demi mengatasi "Bencana Ilusi" di dataran tinggi, orang-orang mengekstrak energi Bunga Ilusi dan menciptakan medan uji coba ilusi yang bisa dimasuki — Lembah Hutan Mimpi. Namun, kekuatan ilusi tersebut sulit dikendalikan sepenuhnya, dan segala sesuatu di dalamnya menjadi variabel yang tak terprediksi.

Para pengrajin menempa perangkat pertahanan di pintu masuk, sementara para petualang menyelusup lebih dalam untuk mengungkap rahasianya. Ada yang tersesat karenanya dan tenggelam di alam mimpi. Tempat ini adalah area eksplorasi yang penuh godaan, sekaligus membawa harapan untuk mengembalikan kedamaian di dataran tinggi.

area damage.text:
Unleashes built-up cold energy in a violent surge, dealing Magic Damage and inflicting Frozen on nearby enemies.
Charging the skill alters both its range and DMG.
Tier 1: Chants for 1s, targeting an 8m frontal cone.
Tier 2: Chants for 2s, targeting an 8m frontal cone with 50% increased DMG.
Tier 3: Chants for 3s, targeting an 8m frontal cone with 100% increased DMG.
When holding 1/3/5 Frost Crystal, the skill will instantly cast at Tier 1/2/3, skipping the charge time.

Tips: This skill offers both area damage and crowd control. For best results, cast it when you have high Frost Crystal count.

Harnesses forest power to summon a spirit deer that charges forward, dealing massive Forest DMG to all enemies along its path. When it vanishes, it leaves behind a Fertile Domain that heals allies standing inside.
"Power of the earth, heart of the forest-may the source of life never run dry!"

Pro Tips: This Ultimate creates a wide rectangular area damage path and a healing zone. Pay attention to enemy placement before casting. While active, each attack skill that hits an enemy spawns a Dodder Seed-chain your skills to trigger more.

A supreme sword technique sharp enough to cut the air itself. Unleashes a flurry of slashes in front, dealing Attack Damage to all enemies in range. Grants max Thunder Sigil at the end of the strike.

"Heaven's weapon dims even the brightest stars."

Tips: Cast when Thunder Sigil is empty to quickly charge it. Also effective against multiple targets for massive area damage.

Oblivion Combo
A supreme sword technique sharp enough to cut the air itself. Unleashes a flurry of slashes in front, dealing Attack DMG to all enemies in range. Grants max Thunder Sigil at the end of the strike.
"Heaven's weapon dims even the brightest stars."

Tips: Cast when Thunder Sigil is empty to quickly charge it. Also effective against multiple targets for massive area damage.

Basic Attack: Thunderclap Arcane
Performs up to three consecutive thunder-infused strikes, each dealing Thunder Element damage.
Plunge Attack:·Thunderfall from the Heavens
Charges lightning energy into the gauntlet mid-air, then dives down to impact the ground, dealing Thunder Element damageon landing.
Heavy Strike: Thunder Onslaught
Gathers energy to unleash a powerful cannon blast. During the charge, consumes heat gauge to continuously stack Thunder Onslaught, which increases DMG and range. Releasing the skill or completing the charge unleashes a wide fan-shaped Lightning area damage.
Thunderclap
Increases the next Thunder Onslaught's DMG and AoE range, stacking up to 3 times.

Pro Tips: When monsters are close, hold down Basic Attack to more efficiently knock them back.

Thunderburst Oblivion
Launches an Oblivion Bomb that detonates after a short flight or on impact, unleashing a destructive burst of Lightning area damage. Immediately maxes out the weapon's heat gauge upon cast.

Pro Tips: Cast from a safe distance to unlock a brief window of massive Attack.

Charges and then fires a piercing arrow that deals Attack DMG and Knockback to all enemies in its path. Cannot knock back targets with Resilience, but reduces targets' Resilience. Powerdraw deals a bonus 100% Crit DMG.
This skill holds 2 charges.
No charge time required when in Photon Reforge state.

Tips: Great for reducing enemies' Resilience while dealing area damage.

Channels the power of the stars, entering Star Calling state. While active, greatly increases your Sigil chance and grants Sigil: Falling Star.
Sigil: When DMG is dealt, there is chance to summon 1 meteor to bombard the target area, dealing area damage. More meteors are summoned based on your Sigil chance. This effect has a CD, which - your Sigil chance.

Focuses on your Energy and enter Charge state. While active, Consecutive Hits and Defeats generate up to 5 Engram Orbs. When the duration ends or the skill is cast again, deals DMG based on the number of orbs stored.
For every 8 hits, 1 Engram Orb is generated.
For every Defeat, 1 Engram Orb is generated.
Area damage that hits multiple targets is still counted as a single hit.

Unleashes Sigil: Blazing Surge, dealing minor area damage and creating Blazing Traps in the area. These traps explode on contact with enemies or after a period of time, dealing DMG to surrounding enemies.
Sigil: Summon at least 2 Blazing Traps, with a chance to summon up to 5.

When Lightning Strike hits a target, it triggers Light Prism.
Light Prism: Deals area damage equal to 100% ATK to up to 5 surrounding enemy targets, and additionally applies 3 stacks of Steel Beak.

Spark of the Storm: Shuro Barot summons a Storm Domain and condenses a Storm Core, launching it toward players. Players holding a Wind Shield can tap the extra skill button to deflect the core. If the Storm Core hits Shuro Barot, it interrupts his casting. If it hits the Storm Domain, it triggers area damage across the whole battlefield.

Tips: Stand in the Storm Core's path early to deflect it. Multiple players can work together to coordinate the bounces. On Hard mode and above, Shuro Barot also summons a Storm Barrier-players must bounce the core multiple times to let it bypass the barrier.

Serangan yang diterima akan dipantulkan menjadi Area Damage sebesar <style="accent-gn">10%</style> <style="emph-gn">Max HP</style>.
Serangan yang diterima akan dipantulkan menjadi Area Damage sebesar <style="accent-gn">400%</style> <style="emph-gn">PDEF</style>.

<style="emph-gn">Berbagi</style> Area Damage dengan warna yang sesuai!

Corroded Poison: Pinjam skill Akuphis untuk menghancurkan Snake Egg sebelum membusuk.
Strategi: Snake Egg yang dihancurkan akan mengakibatkan Area Damage dengan jangkauan luas, menghancurkan terlalu banyak dalam waktu yang sama akan mengakibatkan tim gugur.

Death Screech: Akuphis menghimpun daya selama beberapa saat, lalu terus-menerus mengakibatkan Area Damage ke seluruh area.
Strategi: Saat Akuphis melancarkan skill ini, semua Snakeling dengan warna yang sama seperti kristal yang diserap akan mendapat shield, kalahkan Snakeling untuk merebut shield tersebut.

Frost Blast: Mengakibatkan fatal DMG di area depan. Jika tidak ada pemain di area, area Damage akan meluas.
Strategi: Class Guardian tahan serangan dengan mengaktifkan Skill DR.

Void Fog Spray: Xulothar menandai beberapa pemain dengan Void Fog. Setelah beberapa saat, Void Fog akan mengakibatkan Area Damage besar ke arah yang ditentukan.
Strategi: Pemain yang ditandai harus segera bergerak dan pastikan tidak ada rekan tim di area peringatan. Pada tingkat kesulitan Hard, 2 pemain akan terkena Void Fog. Di tingkat Nightmare, jumlahnya akan menjadi 3.

Territory Expulsion: Radiant Crown – Sunflare dan Celestial Crown - Moonshade akan memanggil Light Orb di teritorinya masing-masing, lalu memanggil Light Orb interaksi di tengah arena. 10 detik kemudian, Light Orb akan mengakibatkan Area Damage dalam jumlah besar ke arah Light Orb yang ada di tengah arena.
Strategi: Dua orang pemain harus berinteraksi dengan Light Orb dan memindahkannya ke tepian arena agar tidak mengakibatkan DMG terhadap tim.

Ground-Shattering Fist - Onslaught - Third: Stone Remains mengunci perangkat ruin, lalu membentuk Area Damage yang bisa dibagi di lokasi perangkat. Selama periode ini, perangkat tidak bisa dipindahkan atau digerakkan. Jika semua perangkat dapat berbagi DMG, Phantabloom Remains akan memasuki status Weak.
Strategi: Setidaknya 3 pemain turut berbagi DMG. Beberapa perangkat mungkin harus berbagi DMG secara bersamaan.

Grand Flame Ring: Blighted Blossom menghimpun energi di dalam tubuhnya dan mengakibatkan DMG tinggi berbentuk lingkaran, lalu kembali menghimpun daya untuk mengakibatkan Decay Area Damage tinggi dengan elemen Fire dan meledakkan semua Phantom Echo di arena. Phantom Echo yang meledak akan mengakibatkan DMG tinggi terhadap seluruh pemain, membuat semua pemain terus-menerus kehilangan HP, dan meninggalkan area DoT di lokasi semula.
Strategi: Manfaatkan Ember-End Trajectory untuk menghancurkan Phantom Echo. Jika dihancurkan oleh Grand Flame Ring, petualang harus mengaktifkan skill DR lebih awal.

Flameshade Obliteration: Radiant Crown – Sunflare dan Celestial Crown - Moonshade bersatu mengusir pendatang asing. Setelah menghimpun tenaga untuk sesaat, mereka akan membentuk Flameshade Entangler sekaligus terhubung dengan semua pemain dan Area Damage dengan zona aman di bagian tengah, lalu memilih pemain untuk berbagi DMG. Saat Flameshade Entangler meledak, semua pemain akan terpukul mundur.
Strategi: Berkumpul di tengah arena untuk menghindari Area Damage dan berbagi DMG dengan pemain yang warnanya sama, lalu mengamati warna yang terhubung dengan diri sendiri dan terpukul mundur ke arah yang sebaliknya.
Bergerak mengakibatkan gelombang kejut, memberikan Area Damage.

斩杀之匕：影之祭刃者在点名玩家头顶召唤斩杀之匕，数秒后降下斩杀，命中后，对该名玩家造成必杀伤害和小范围伤害。被点名玩家需要交互生灵图腾使用生之庇护护盾，赦免斩魂匕的必杀伤害。
技巧攻略：被点的玩家快速前往交互生灵图腾。

腐蚀落毒：可以借助阿库菲斯该技能在蛇蛋腐化之前摧毁。
技巧攻略：蛇蛋被摧毁会造成大范围伤害，一次摧毁太多会导致团灭。

死亡尖啸：阿库菲斯蓄力一段时间后对全场进行持续的范围伤害。
技巧攻略：阿库菲斯释放该技能时,场上所有与当前吸收水晶同颜色小蛇会获得一个免疫护盾,击杀小蛇会夺取护盾。

冰霜重击：对前方区域产生一次致死伤害，如果没有玩家在区域内，则造成大范围伤害。
技巧攻略：守护职业开启减伤技能承接伤害。

虚雾喷洒：修洛特尔点名若干个玩家获得虚雾, 一段时间后虚雾会对指定朝向造成大范围伤害。
技巧攻略：被点名的玩家需要尽快移动,保证自身预警范围内没有队友。在困难难度下会有两个玩家获得虚雾， 噩梦难度下数量会变为三个。

领地驱逐指令：煌之冠·阳炎、苍之冠·月影分别在自己的领地召唤对应的光球，并在场地中召唤对应交互光球，10秒后光球对场地中光球方向造成大量范围伤害。
技巧攻略：两名玩家分别与光球进行交互，将其牵至场地两侧避免对团队造成伤害。

碎地重拳·连袭·其三：石骸锁定遗迹装置，在其位置生成可被分摊的范围伤害，期间装置无法被搬运和移动位置，若所有装置均分摊成功即可使幻花的陈骸进入虚弱状态。
技巧攻略：由至少3名玩家参与分摊，需注意同时可能存在多个装置需要分摊。

炎影湮灭：煌之冠·阳炎与苍之冠·月影合力驱逐外来者，短暂的蓄力后生成炎影纠缠体，同时与所有玩家分别连线并在场地中生成仅有中间安全的范围伤害，随后点名分摊。当炎影纠缠体爆炸时，击退所有玩家。

Stack.text: For Asterleeds, that place is the Port Town. It's a bit of a maze, sure, but that's part of its charm, history stacked on history.
What? I just had that role two days ago! Don't you remember hiding in the haystack when I found you?
I saw you digging through that stack of crates. What were you trying to find?
Maybe it's covered by the haystack! Let's search separately! I'll search this pile, and Adventurer, you can search that pile~
*You discover a small stack of files on Abeku.*
Yeah! This score's gonna keep me fed for a while. Gonna flip these bites for a nice stack of Luno...
Anyway, in the Floaters, everyone's got a job. Always hustling, always stacking, handing out the candy. No one's just sitting around.
But don't let that fool you! Synthesis Mode can process multiple materials at once and even stack their unique effects together!

Investigate the stacked wooden crates
We choose a stone with the right texture, shape, and color to reflect the life they lived. We call it Astral Stone. When stacked together, these stones become our tribute to all who have passed.
Ah, Triffin. I remember him. The one who claims to sell Caprahorn hides and brought a whole stack of contracts. His goods don't match the report, so his pass won't be approved.
Hide behind the stack of goods

Tsk, you should have been there to see it for yourself!
Priest Horrace was holding a huge stack of indictments, and he'd just cleared his throat to read them, but didn't manage to get even a word out!

Dream.text: Hard to believe I'm still alive after the Asterleeds Independence War. Sometimes it still feels like a dream.
All right then. Those stubborn moments in pursuit of a dream... they're one of the few truly endearing things about humanity.
So that's how it is... Eder did it all to fulfill my dream...
Asterleeds is the capital of commerce! Dreams and fame can all be measured in glittering Luno. Coolness belongs to the richest, of course!
I hope, when you dream, a part of Asterleeds sails with you too.

Today, the ships anchored at our port, the dreams sailing from these docks... they belong to us. Some call it greed. I call it never being satisfied, always moving forward. That, young one, is the spirit of Asterleeds.
Friend, the beauty of Asterleeds is that greedy dreams belong to everyone! From every walk of life, from high to low!
I'll never forget the sight of him. Tall, calm, commanding... That's when I first dreamed of becoming a politician.
I hope your dream comes true.
I'm here to apply for citizenship, of course! My dream is to become a councilor. And I'm going to chase that goal one step at a time.
Ugh, this is never-ending. I don't want to work in Asterleeds' trade scene at all. My dream is to see the world!
One day, ships from Asterleeds will cross every corner of The Continent of Magna. That's the dream.
Relax. If you behave yourself, I wouldn't dream of hurting someone as cute as you, sweetie.
I've been working hard for that dream. Earned a marine biology certificate, learned navigation, and now I'm studying for my offshore boating license!
My life's dream? To catch the legendary fish that only appears after a winged whale soars over the waves...
But hey, if you're talking reality and not dreams, well then, my bad! Haha.
Life is a roaring sea. To set sail, you need bold dreams as your anchor, something solid to hold onto before you can leave port.
This is the city of dreams, the city of water, the city of ideals. To wander its puzzles and suddenly stumble upon unexpected beauty... it feels like pure magic.
To capture the entire sea with my brush... that's my life's dream and purpose as an artist.
To become such a charming figure is my dream.
Everything good ends up in this port city, brought in by the tides and the wind. Silks, swords, artisanship, and people with dreams as high as the skies...
Just saying that beautiful, resonant name can stir countless dreams across the globe.
Picture this: white sand, bright sun, music, laughter, the ocean breeze... Add good food and fun, and you've got yourself a resort dream.
But... this has been my dream since I was a child. I grew up listening to stories of priests. Can you understand how I feel?

Those who cannot create delicious cuisine are the ones who refuse to follow recipes, preferring their sudden flights of fancy. They cut corners, substitute inferior ingredients, mix up components, dream up wild ideas, outsmart themselves, and barely pass muster...
It's like something from a dream, incredible and captivating...
Forget all those dreams of stumbling across some mythical treasure and making it big. Might as well just stick to good old-fashioned arena fights.
Then the Asterleeds Independence War started. We won, sure. But some dreams and memories faded with the passing years.
At this point, all I can do is speak from the heart and hope the message lands. It might not go perfectly, but trying is better than just daydreaming.
Good night then, Father. See you in your dreams.
But I knew that becoming an Adventurer, going on adventures, and enjoying exploration was your true dream.
But maybe skip it for political meetings, haha. It's a little too dreamy!
Our store's limited-edition perfume, "Whispered Dreams," is now available. Don't miss out!
Every time I hear them perform, it's like being in a painted world, magnificent and splendid... And it's also like a hazy dream at dawn, both misty and beautiful... Ah...
They're sailors' Charms, fortune-tellers' lovers, healers' assistants, painters' inspiration, and the dreamy essence of temptation itself...!

Passion! Friendship! Victory! The spirit to push onward! The thrill of the underdog's challenge! Dreams shattered and rebuilt beyond their limits! Heroes born to the roar of the crowd! The agony of defeat, soaked in tears...!
Is it your dream? Or just trying to pay rent at that outrageously overpriced tavern in Asterleeds?
At this point, all I can do is speak from the heart and hope the message resonates. It might not go perfectly, but trying is better than just daydreaming.
I had a dream recently in which this giant tower crumbled. I was worried this might be prophetic, so I decided to investigate in person.
Charlie, stop dreaming.
How could such a powerful weapon possibly fall into Charlie's hands? He's dreaming!
Here's your promised reward, my friend. Although the bounty is still pending, I wouldn't dream of disappointing my friend. Take this advance payment.
Or at the very least, don't ruin the kids' dreams of treasure hunting.
Back in the day, I dreamed of becoming a dungeon designer, but turns out, that Class doesn't really exist in the real world.
Fine... but I'll never surrender my dream!
It's just that a dream is about direction, but what a child needs to do is build up the strength to pursue that dream. To do that, she has to do homework and get an education.
If I have to cram into the same place with other factions, it's definitely not the cool and mysterious organization of my dreams!
How could you? I didn't even get a chance to mourn over my shattered dream before the stench and filth snapped me back to reality!
Am I... Am I dreaming? Can I really join the Corps?! I've actually applied so many times already, but never passed the qualification exam...
Though strength like that isn't something you just pick up, it doesn't hurt to dream...
And what if you lose everything? Oof, don't think like that! Focus on the dream, buddy! Stay positive!
Ah, the shimmer of those glossy candy wrappers... Full of dreams and full of hope.
Back then, Skarl and I shared the same dream.
Always dreaming of maintaining ties with the surface world. It'll never work!
(Byrnhald swears) You think you can cause trouble on my turf? Dream on.
Because the Adventurer saw through your game long ago. Maybe it's time you stopped dreaming up tricks.
Because the Adventurer saw through your game long ago. Maybe it's time you stopped dreaming up tricks.
The soldiers need it. Many still dream, still fear, still think about... about those things.
People always dreaming of making it big... just makes it easier to lose your head. Literally.
In this underground world, you've got people who gamble with wrappers, people who just wanna throw punches, and others who dream of striking it rich.
But if it's just a dream, why do the sights in these memories feel so real?
Let me think... The ritual, the medal, and the Void Engram! Then it felt like I fell into a dream.
Maybe it isn't a dream, but a reality realm fabricated by memory. And the reason you were dragged in, too, is...

It reminds me of when I was young—I always dreamed of making a toy that glowed in the dark, but I could never get my hands on luminous wings to make it. If only there had been a genie back then to grant my wish.
I'm long past the age of dreaming, Miss Tina. Once I find the Imagine Seed, I'll only use it to trap Denvel and then personally send him on his way.
Well... I'm a musician from Minsterhorn. I've always dreamed of composing a song about Hero's Herb.
Yeah, yeah... Still, I dreamed of someone truly tasting the magic...
Right? Right? Madam, this is the kind of once-in-a-lifetime view people dream about.
(I try to recall my past, but my mind is completely blank. Even that strange dream from before has faded into a blur.)
Ah! So it wasn't a dream! I'm really safe... finally...
<style="emph-gn">{*me.name*}</style>? Am I... still dreaming?
I was happily dreaming away when BAM! A sound like thunder shocked me awake!
(Having escaped her fears, she drifts into deep slumber, her lips curved in a faint smile, probably experiencing sweet dreams.)
If he quits halfway, what does that make my dream?
Hmph, Zek's clearly feeling guilty. The moment I mention 'original purpose' or 'dreams,' he gets all defensive.
I can imagine he's caught in a tough spot—on one side, there's the camp and old friends that need him, and on the other, there's us and his own dreams.
Maybe he's caught in a tough spot—on one side, there's the camp and old friends that need him, and on the other, there's us and his own dreams.
We've journeyed together and seen the sights along the way... it's unfortunate we couldn't fulfill our dream of touring all of Regnus together, it's a little regretful.
We carried out his final wish and found the treasure of legends. It all feels like a dream!
We carried out his final wish and found the treasure of legends. It all feels like a dream!

Coordinated Attack.text:
Summons a surging Tidal Vortex at the target location, dealing Magic DMG on impact. Channels for 5s after casting. Recast to end early.

Ultra Cold: Tidepool
In the Ultra Cold state, the vortex freezes and violently explodes upon ending, dealing higher Magic DMG to all enemies within range.

Tips: You cannot move or cast other skills while channeling. Best paired with allies' AoE skills in coordinated attacks.

Tames a Wild Wolf to fight alongside you. Storm Arrow has a 30% fixed chance to trigger Coordinated Attack.

Wild Wolf
A Wild Wolf fights alongside you.
Basic Attack: Sweeps the enemy, dealing Attack DMG equal to 60% ATK (which scales with the Level/Tier of your Basic Attack).
Coordinated Attack: Wild Wolf leaps to the enemy and bites, dealing Attack DMG equal to 100% ATK (which scales with the Level/Tier of your Basic Attack).

When Wild Wolf launches a Coordinated Attack, or Tail Sweep, there is a fixed 30% chance to summon a Phantom Direwolf using Pounce and Bite to attack the current enemy.
Pounce and Bite inflicts Bleed, and if the target is already suffered from Bleed, Pounce and Bite deals Crit DMG.

<style="accent-gn">Wild Wolf</style>'s <style="accent-gn">Coordinated Attack</style> has a <style="accent-gn">50%</style> fixed chance to inflict <linktext=1141><style="ItemQuality_5">Bleed</style></linktext>.

While <linktext=1138><style="ItemQuality_5">Photon Reforge</style></linktext> is active, the <style="accent-gn">Wild Wolf</style>'s <style="accent-gn">Coordinated Attack</style> nullifies the target's Armor.

Further enhances Storm Arrow and the Wild Wolf's power.
Storm Arrow always deals 300% Crit DMG on critical hits.
While Photon Reforge is active, the chance for the Wild Wolf to trigger Coordinated Attack is increased to 100%.

The Wild Wolf becomes empowered, and Haste allows both you and the wolf to attack more frequently.

<style="accent-gn">Wild Wolf</style>'s <style="accent-gn">Coordinated Attack</style> reduces the remaining CD of <linktext=1601><style="ItemQuality_5">Storm Arrow</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1</style> second.
A mid-to-close-range weapon enabling Coordinated Attacks.
